violations.text: The condensate from the Walk in freezer refrigeration was observed with an excess of ice build up. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. Establishment must defrost walk in freezer. New Violation. Correct By: 11/19/2025

The floors throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/19/2025
